research.status_summary: Rounds (rounds.com, Herzliya/Tel Aviv) is a privately-held Israeli mobile-app acquisition and optimization company operating under an ongoing business model; it was formerly the Israeli video-chat startup acquired by Kik in 2017 and has since pivoted to a mobile-asset-to-business operation — no recent layoffs, shutdown, or new funding announced as of June 2026.
research.hiring_policy: Active open roles posted on Comeet and Glassdoor include a Business Data Analyst and HR Manager, both listed as hybrid/Tel Aviv-based; no public indication of visa sponsorship or EOR-friendly remote policy, and all visible postings are Israel-local.
recent_news: Rounds (rounds.com) describes itself as using 'proprietary AI/ML technology' to identify and optimize mobile assets for acquisition and subscription monetization, with a Vietnam market expansion of $20M in app acquisitions noted for 2025 — the most recent strategic signal found.

No funding rounds, layoffs, or acquisitions involving Rounds have surfaced in Israeli tech press trackers (Calcalist/CTech) covering the wave of 31 Israel-related layoff events in 2026 — Rounds is notably absent from that list.

A Business Data Analyst role is live on Comeet (rounds.com careers page), with the job spec calling for someone to 'analyze performance data, create dashboards, and provide insights' — consistent with the VP Data contact noted in your context.
research.growth_signal: Headcount sits at ~118 per PitchBook with no disclosed new funding since a $22M total raise; the Vietnam app-acquisition push ($20M, 2025) suggests expansion-by-acquisition rather than organic headcount growth.
research.fit_for_lior: Rounds' data-driven mobile-app optimization model and open Business Data Analyst role align with Lior's Product Analyst thread, and the VP Data contact gives a warm entry point for a hybrid analyst-side conversation.
